nasb.text: He who walks in his uprightness fears the Lord, But he who is devious in his ways despises Him.

esv.text: Whoever walks in uprightness fears the Lord, but he who is devious in his ways despises him.

cnv.text: 行事正直的，敬畏耶和華； 行為乖僻的，卻藐視他。

ccb.text: 行为正直的人敬畏耶和华， 行事邪僻的人轻视耶和华。

csbs.text: 行事正直的，敬畏耶和华； 行为邪僻的，轻视耶和华。
